input.central_argument: Urban heat islands disproportionately affect renters with no legal recourse
key_findings: 4-6C temperature gap in rental vs owner neighborhoods
ER spike in rental-dense zip codes
No cooling requirement in rental codes
Free AC pilot programs show measurable results
Community cooling center funded by donations only

test_cases.notes: Opening scene proposal is specific and scene-grounded. Section map assigns sources correctly. Closing strategy note is sophisticated — correctly warns against the common summarizing-quote mistake. Editor pitch summary is usable in a pitch email. Excellent.

input.central_argument: A generation of workers trained in manufacturing skills is retiring with no pathway for knowledge transfer to younger workers
key_findings: Average age of skilled manufacturing workers in survey is 54
70% of apprenticeship programs in the sector closed between 2005 and 2020
Three companies piloting knowledge-capture programs using video
One community college relaunching a program after 15-year gap

test_cases.notes: Structure correctly adapted for a trade publication (more data-forward, less narrative). Opening scene correctly uses the retiring worker as the human anchor. Section map is well-sequenced from problem through solution.

input.central_argument: A small island community is navigating the tension between tourism-dependent income and the environmental degradation that tourism produces
key_findings: Tourism accounts for 70% of local economy
Coral bleaching has increased 40% in last decade
Local fishermen have seen catches decline alongside visitor numbers increasing
Local government has proposed a visitor cap

test_cases.notes: Narrative approach correctly applied for travel magazine format. Opening scene uses the environmental contrast as the hook. The tension between hotel owner and fishermen is correctly identified as the dramatic spine. Passes threshold.
